titleStmt.title: Stone Pillar in Parts near the Kubyaukkyi Temple and in the Myazedi Pagoda

licence.p: This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 Unported Licence. To view a copy of the licence, visit https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ or send a letter to Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.

projectDesc.p: The project DHARMA has received funding from the European Research Council (ERC) under the European Union's Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme (grant agreement no 809994).

prefixDef.p: Public URIs with the prefix bib to point to a Zotero Group Library named ERC-DHARMA whose data are open to the public.
Internal URIs using the part prefix to point to person elements in the DHARMA_idListMembers_v01.xml file.

div.ab:
|| śrī || (I) buddhādikaṁ vatthuvaraṁ nametvā puññaṁ kataṁ yaṁ jina ///
kaṁ rājakumāranāmadhayyena vakkhāmi suṇ /// || 0 ||
(II) nibbānā lokanāthassa Aṭṭhavīsā ◊ dhike gaCe /// sse pana
vassānaṁ chasate cāpare tathā || 0 || (III) Arimadda /// smi pure Āsi
mahabbalo rājā tibhuvanādicco Udiccā /// va ◊ ṅsajo
(IV) tassāsekā piyā devi sā tilokava /// kā hitesī
kusalā sabbakiccesu pana rā[j]i[n]o || /// || (V) (t) /// sāseko su
to rāja ◊ ku ◊ māro nāma nāmato Amacco rājakiccesu
byāvato satimā vidū || 0 || (VI) Adā gāmattayaṁ tassā de
◊ viyā so mahīpati pasanno savvadā [dā]saparibhogena
bhuñjituṁ || 0 || (VII) Aniccatāvasaṁ tassā ga(t)āya pana deviyā
rāja rājakumārassa Adā gāmattayaṁ puna || 0 || (VIII) Aṭṭhavīsati
vassāni rajjaṁ dhammena kāriya mā ◊ rananti(k)arogassa vasaṁ pa
tte narādhipe || 0 || (IX) saranto dhammarājassa (ma)hantaṁ guṇasañca
yaṁ kāretvā satthuno bi ◊ mba sabbasova[ṇṇa]yaṁ subhaṁ || 0 || (X) ga
hetvā taṁ ◊ mahantena sakkārena sumānas[o] Upasaṅkamma
rājānaṁ Āha cintitam attano || 0 || (XI) bhāgaṁ katvānidaṁ satthu
bimbaṁ sovaṇṇayaṁ su ◊ bhaṁ Akāsiṁ vo varaṁ puññaṁ sā ◊ mi
tumhe numodatha || (XII) gāmattayaṁ pi vo sāmi pubbe dinna
n tu me Ahaṁ Imasseva munindassa demi taññ cānumodatha || 0
|| ◊ (XIII) Evaṁ vutte mahīpālo rogenāturamānaso sādhu sā
ti vatvāna tu ◊ ṭṭhahattho pamodito || 0 || (XIV) dayāparo pa
hāthero thero ◊ muggaliputtako sumedhattā su
medho ti laddhanāmo ca ◊ paṇḍito || 0 || (XV) brahmapā
lo tathā brahmadevo sampannasīlavā sono bahu
ssuto saṅghasennavho varapaṇḍito || 0 || (XVI) Etesaṁ
pana bhikkhūnaṁ saṁmukhā so sumānaso (ja)laṁ pātesi katvā
na sakkhin tu vasudhātalaṁ || 0 || (XVII) tat(o) so taṁ mahāmacco
bim /// sovaṇ(ṇ)ayaṁ subhaṁ pati /// i /// (kāresi gu)
{[ha]} (ka) /// (XVIII) (kat)[vā na] maṅgalaṁ buddhapa ///
timāya gu ◊ hāya ca Akāsevaṁ paṇī ◊ dhānaṁ
nibbinno bhavasaṅkate || 0 || (XIX) karontena mayā Etaṁ
yaṁ puññaṁ taṁ samācitaṁ hotu sabbaññutaññāṇaṁ
pahivedhāya paccay[o] || 0 || (XX) yattakā tu mayā
dāsā gāmattayanivāsino dinnā gu ◊ hāya sova
/// patimāya mahesino || 0 || (XXI) putto me vā pa
/// tt(o) vā Añño vā pana ññātako yo koci
pasaṅkappo naro Assaddhamānaso || 0 || (XXII) ka[r]e
yyapadduvaṁ tesaṁ dāsānaṁ so narādhamo mittiyyadi
pa ◊ dinda ◊ ssa dassanaṁ nādhigacchatū ti || 0 ||

{[r]}/// u(d)[dh]
ddha tirleY kuli A /// moya lṅima ///
ḅāR cvas· diññcāM cnāM tuY || ḍe /// ḍu
ArimaddanapuR voA· smiṄ śrītribhu ///
mmarāj· das· || gna kyeK smiṄ goḥ[h](·) ///
lokavaṭaṁsakā de ◊ vi Imo ///
kyeK goḥh· rājakumāR Imo ///
g(o)ḥh· kiL ḍiK pi tvāñÑ ku gna Ce ///
g(o)ḥh· || kāL gna kyeK goḥh· cu(t)
AUT kiryā gna kyeK goḥ ku ḍiK pi ///
goḥh· smiṄ tuN keiL ku koN gna ///
ma ImoA· rāja[ku]māR goḥh· || smi ///
kmiN ḅār cvas· diññcāM cnāM tuY (k) ///
goḥ 'jeY ññaN scuti || koN ///
ma ImoA· rāja ◊ kumāR go ///
Rnas· guṇ· ma smiṄ IññciM jirk ///
kyaK thaR moY ĀR tu(ḅ)oK smi
Ṅ munas· roV voA· || kyeK thaR voA· E-
Y ḍiK pa raṁpoA· tirla ḍi(K) pi tvāñÑ ma
tirla keiL ku EY goḥ /// EY ḍiK
kiL ku kyeK voA· tirla Anu-
modanā da || kāL goḥ smiṄ (sḍ)iK gap puma-
s· thiC Ā thiC Ā smiṄ pa sādhu(k)āR || kāL
goḥ tirla ◊ poY mhāthe /// | ticāR
muggaliputtatissattheR || ◊ ticā /// [su]medhapa-
ṇḍiT || ticār brah///pāL || (ti) /// R brahma-
/// [va || ti]cār(·) son(·) || t(i)cā /// (ṅgha)sena-
{[var]}paṇḍiT || kinta tir[l]a (t)a goḥ smiṄ
cuT ḍeK haN ti || blaḥ (go) /// (ko)N
gna kyeK ma ImoA· rājaku /// (go)ḥ
keT kyeK thaR goḥh· thāpa?ā ka /// guo-
h· cloṄ thaR voA· || kāL busaC
kyeK goh· voA· koN gna kyek g(o)ḥ
keT saKmunaloN moY tvāñÑ /// pā-
Y moY tvāññaḥh· girUY moY
tvāñÑ || 'uT ḍiK pi tvāñÑ goḥ cu-
T ḍeK ku kyeK thaR ma thāpanā
hiN guoḥ voA· rādhanā roV vo-
°· || sinraṄ EY voA· OR das· he-
T ku gvoA· sarvvaññutaññāṇ· |[|] ko-
N EY laḥ || coV EA· laḥ || kulo
EY laḥ || ññaḥ c'eṄ laḥ || yaL pa U-
padroV ku ḍiK ma EY kiL ku
kyeK voA· yaṄ ññiRññāC kye-
K treY metteY laḥ OR ḍeh·
goA· || 0 ||

1 . siri . dathagaṃda ḅa doṃ ḅaṁḥ ḅiṁḥ pduṃ sguṃ daṃḥ ḅa tva 1000 600
20 hraTṁ O sniṄḥ ḅiṁḥ tvaṄṃṁḥ tha daṄṃṁ yaṁ tiṁ priṄḥ rimadhaMnarbu O rmiṄ ḅiṁḥ si // sri tribhu
vaṃnadiTṃṁtya dhaMmaraja O rmiṄ ḅiṁḥ si // O doṄṃḥ ḍaZ ḅaṁḥ O rvaṄṃḥ ma yaḥ triḍo
gavadasaga deṃviṃ ḅiṁḥ si O rmi // pau O saḥ rajaguma biṁḥ
si O rmi // O vaṁ traḥ kra hoḥ ḅiṁḥ paṁḥ toḥZ // pau ḅaṁḥ ma yaḥ biṁḥ
hi ta daṃṁ // ḅaṁḥ ma yaḥ O tra traḥ kra hoḥ ḅiṁḥ paṁḥ tḅaḥ ḅaṁḥ ma yaḥ
O saḥ rajaguma O vaṁ // pau ḅiṁḥ tdaṃḥ sniḥ rpu hraṁ ḅiṁḥ ta daṃṁ // 0 //
ḅiṁḥ sriḥ ḅiṁḥ hniṁḥ hḍiṁḥ hi O mtu duṃ roḥZ // pau ḅaṁḥ ma yaḥ O saḥ
rajaguma ḅiṁḥ si O rmi // O diṃṁ ḅiṁḥ mtau ma pau tdaṃḥ to O kḍeḥ troḥ
diṃṁ ḅiṁḥ mdauṃ haḥ ḍaḥ daṃṁ // pau ḅaṁḥ ḅudha O chaḥ bo bradima tha tlu ḅiṁḥ se
kyaḥ // pau ḅaṁḥ budha ḅiṁḥ tuḥ thmuḥ ḍoḥ yaṁ naṁ ḅiṁḥ tdiṃḥ toḥZ // yaṁ
ḅudha tha ḅaṁḥ raḥ saḥ biṁḥ se ma ḅuḥ ḅaṁḥ O vaṁ paṁḥ che choḥZ // yaṁ traḥ
kra nhoḥ ḅiṁḥ paṁḥ ma ḅuḥ // yaṁ ḅaṁḥ hra tha O vaṁ paṁḥ cheZ // pau ḍoḥ ḅaṁḥ
tdaṃḥ ḅiṁḥ kiṁ pa daṃṁ ḅiṁḥ ṅa ha pra choḥ ha choḥ ḅiṁḥ si // pau O
doṃḥ traḥ ḅaṁḥ mhaṭhe / traḥ ḅaṁḥ mugaṃtubudiṁsaṭhe / traḥ ḅaṁḥ
saumedhaḅadiṃṁ / traḥ ḅaṁḥ vrahmaba / traḥ ḅaṁḥ vrahmadaṃyoḥ / traḥ ḅaṁḥ
su / traḥ ḅaṁḥ sagaṃsirvaṃrabadiṃṁ / pau traḥ baṁḥ sagha tvo O hṅa
diṁ duṃ tdaṃḥ tu ḅaṁḥ ḅiṁḥ cha toḥ tduṃ // pau ḅiṁḥ ta daṃṁ ma yaḥ O saḥ
rajaguma ḅiṁḥ si O rmi maZ // ḅiṁḥ staḅana ḅudha tha ḅiṁḥ se goṃ
O stau tha ḅiṁḥ ta daṃṁ // pau goṃ O hḍī ḅiṁḥ saṁḥ ma roḥ // samana
rḍoḥ kra taṁ // ra bai kra taṁ / jiṁ vuḥ kra taṁ / yaṁ traḥ kra hoḥ diṃṁ ḅiṁḥ
diṃṁ daṃṁ // yaṁ ḅaṁḥ ma yaḥ O saḥ rajaguma yaṁ goṃ ḅaṁḥ ḅudha
O vaṁ tduṃ ḅiṁḥ chai ta daṃṁ // yaṁ na ḅiṁḥ diṃṁ cho // yaṁ ma gaṁḥ pra ḅuḥ
saveñudeña breña ḅiṁḥ ḅiṁḥ paṁḥ che naḥ tiṁ pḍaṁḥ pa //
yaṁ trasaḥ ḍa / gi pḍi ḍa / gi sruḥ
ḍa / mra ja hṅa ḍa / yaṁ ḅudha O vaṁ gaṁḥ hḍiṁḥ toḥ
ma diṃṁ / ga hñiṁ ci ga bro pdaṃ ma taḥ ṅuḥ ḅuḥ // yaṁ baṁḥ
ḅudha Arimedeyaṃ daṃṁ ḅaḥ kdiṃ kchiṁḥ tiṁ tmu ma paṁḥ
che choḥZ .@

app.note: Blagden reads our <O> as <U>; Krech reads it as< ʔa>.
For phonological symmetry (and to eliminate the long vowel ū), Krech reads Blagden’s long ū as av (and -va as av?). We read short u for ū in these words.
Problem of Blagden’s ḷ, which we provisionally read as ḍ.
"B appears to have <riṁ>, which is probably the right reading in A also, though the latter may have <riḥ>." (Blagden)
<nu> is a typographical error for <ṅu> which is correctly written in . Should this be read <ṅu>?

div.p: 1. <siri>: Observe the same shape of <ri> in PYU 34.
12. <ḅudha tha ḅaṁḥ>: <ḅaṁḥ ḅudha tha ḅaṁḥ> A.
14. <ha choḥ ḅiṁḥ si //>: <ha pra choḥ ḅiṁḥ si //> A.

20. <hḍī>: The mystery <ī> has a different shape in A. In B, the tall component comes out of the left side of <h> (unlike the similarly shaped tall component of the <au> in the preceding <pau>) and the shorter component is higher than its counterpart in A.
25. <gi pḍi ḍa / gi>: A is missing the punctuation mark.
26. <ḍa / >: <ḍaZ>: A, omitting the punctuation mark but inserting <Z>:.
26. <ḍa / mra>: A omits the punctuation mark.
26. <ḍa / yaṁ>: A omits the punctuation mark.

Both (B) and 153-65 (B) note the B-readings (008) where they diverge from those on pillar A. (Krech, in his transliteration, however, substitutes B-readings for A when more likely.) 63-71 gives a separate Burmese script transliteration for the B-pillar. Re-edited here from published photographs and our team’s RTIs.
